response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Naver, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of production GenAI/RAG systems, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), Python depth, or customer-facing technical leadership at the staff level expected for a Forward Deployed Engineer. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of recent AI work.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at Naver
Deep full-stack and systems engineering background spanning TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-scale microservices
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and mentoring (TDD, Selenium course, refactoring dojos)
concerns: No explicit production experience with RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Python is not listed in skills despite being a core requirement of the role
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery/consulting work required for a Forward Deployed Engineer position

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work at Naver
Absence of Python in stated skill set
